lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਉਪਿਓਨੁ ਇਸੁ ਸਉਦੇ ਲਾਇਕ ॥
lines.translit: giaan raas naam dhan saupion is saude laaeik |
lines.english: He has blessed me with the capital, the wealth of spiritual wisdom; He has made me worthy of this merchandise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਝੀ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਲਿ ਬਹਾਲਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਇਕ ॥
lines.translit: saajhee gur naal bahaaliaa sarab sukh paaeik |
lines.english: He has made me a partner with the Guru; I have obtained all peace and comforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਨਾਲਹੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਤਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਗਲਾ ਲਾਇਕ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: mai naalahu kade na vichhurrai har pitaa sabhanaa galaa laaeik |21|
lines.english: He is with me, and shall never separate from me; the Lord, my father, is potent to do everything. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਚੜਿਆ ਸਿਉ ਤੋੜਿ ਢੂਢਿ ਸਜਣ ਸੰਤ ਪਕਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kacharriaa siau torr dtoodt sajan sant pakiaa |
lines.english: O Nanak, break away from the false, and seek out the Saints, your true friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਜੀਵੰਦੇ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਓਇ ਮੁਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ਛੋੜਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: oe jeevande vichhurreh oe mueaa na jaahee chhorr |1|
lines.english: The false shall leave you, even while you are still alive; but the Saints shall not forsake you, even when you are dead. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਜੁਲੀਆ ਚਮਕੰਨਿ ਘੁਰਨੑਿ ਘਟਾ ਅਤਿ ਕਾਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bijuleea chamakan ghurana ghattaa at kaaleea |
lines.english: O Nanak, the lightning flashes, and thunder echoes in the dark black clouds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਸਨਿ ਮੇਘ ਅਪਾਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਗਮਿ ਪਿਰੀ ਸੁਹੰਦੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: barasan megh apaar naanak sangam piree suhandeea |2|
lines.english: The downpour from the clouds is heavy; O Nanak, the soul-brides are exalted and embellished with their Beloved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਥਲ ਨੀਰਿ ਭਰੇ ਸੀਤਲ ਪਵਣ ਝੁਲਾਰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal neer bhare seetal pavan jhulaarade |
lines.english: The ponds and the lands are overflowing with water, and the cold wind is blowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜੜੀਆ ਸੋਇੰਨ ਹੀਰੇ ਲਾਲ ਜੜੰਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sejarreea soein heere laal jarrandeea |
lines.english: Her bed is adorned with gold, diamonds and rubies;

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਭਰ ਕਪੜ ਭੋਗ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰੀ ਵਿਹੂਣੀ ਤਤੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: subhar kaparr bhog naanak piree vihoonee tateea |3|
lines.english: she is blessed with beautiful gowns and delicacies, O Nanak, but without her Beloved, she burns in agony. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਤੈ ਜੋ ਕੀਆ ਸੋਈ ਹੈ ਕਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaran karatai jo keea soee hai karanaa |
lines.english: He does the dees which the Creator causes him to do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਧਾਵਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀਆ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: je sau dhaaveh praaneea paaveh dhur lahanaa |
lines.english: Even if you run in hundreds of directions, O mortal, you shall still receive what you are pre-destined to receive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਲਭਈ ਜੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਸਭ ਧਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin karamaa kichhoo na labhee je fireh sabh dharanaa |
lines.english: Without good karma, you shall obtain nothing, even if you wander across the whole world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਖੋਜਤ ਫਿਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhai te bairaag aoopajai har khojat firanaa |
lines.english: Through the Fear of God, the attitude of detachment wells up, and one sets out in search of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਭਉ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕਾ ਭੈ ਡਰੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur mil bhau govind kaa bhai ddar door karanaa |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, you shall know the Fear of God, and other fears shall be taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਸਹਜੁ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਮਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat sehaj upajiaa fir janam na maranaa |
lines.english: Searching and searching, intuitive wisdom wells up, and then, one is not born to die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਆਇ ਕਮਾਇ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾਧ ਸਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: hiaae kamaae dhiaaeaa paaeaa saadh saranaa |
lines.english: Practicing meditation within my heart, I have found the Sanctuary of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਮਰਣੁ ਕਬੂਲਿ ਜੀਵਣ ਕੀ ਛਡਿ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: pahilaa maran kabool jeevan kee chhadd aas |
lines.english: First, accept death, and give up any hope of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਚੜਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰਣਾ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: bohith naanak deo gur jis har charraae tis bhaujal taranaa |22|
lines.english: Whoever the Lord places on the boat of Guru Nanak, is carried across the terrifying world-ocean. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Dakhanay Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਆ ਜੀਵੰਦਾ ਪੇਖੁ ਜੀਵੰਦੇ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: muaa jeevandaa pekh jeevande mar jaan |
lines.english: See, that only one who has died, truly lives; one who is alive, consider him dead.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁਕਾ ਤਉ ਆਉ ਹਮਾਰੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hohu sabhanaa kee renukaa tau aau hamaarai paas |1|
lines.english: Become the dust of the feet of all, and then, you may come to me. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਮੁਹਬਤਿ ਇਕ ਸਿਉ ਤੇ ਮਾਣਸ ਪਰਧਾਨ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jinaa muhabat ik siau te maanas paradhaan |2|
lines.english: Those who are in love with the One Lord, are the supreme people. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਪੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: jis man vasai paarabraham nikatt na aavai peer |
lines.english: Pain does not even approach that person, within whose mind God abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹ ਅਡੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kehan na jaaeeai sach saah addolai |
lines.english: Your worth cannot be estimated, O True, Unmoving Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਖ ਤਿਖ ਤਿਸੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪਈ ਜਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਆਵੈ ਨੀਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhukh tikh tis na viaapee jam nahee aavai neer |3|
lines.english: Hunger and thirst do not affect him, and the Messenger of Death does not approach him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਧਿਆਨੀਆ ਕਉਣੁ ਤੁਧੁਨੋ ਤੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: sidh saadhik giaanee dhiaaneea kaun tudhuno tolai |
lines.english: The Siddhas, seekers, spiritual teachers and meditators - who among them can measure You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੰਨਣ ਘੜਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਹੈ ਓਪਤਿ ਸਭ ਪਰਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhanan gharran samarath hai opat sabh paralai |
lines.english: You are all-powerful, to form and break; You create and destroy all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਮਾਹੇ ਸਭਸੈ ਕਿਆ ਮਾਣਸੁ ਡੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: rijak samaahe sabhasai kiaa maanas ddolai |
lines.english: You give sustanance to all; why should mankind waver?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਹੈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਭ ਬੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath hai ghatt ghatt sabh bolai |
lines.english: You are all-powerful to act, and inspire all to act; You speak through each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਕੰਮੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਕੀਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਉਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: soee kam kamaavanaa keea dhur maulai |
lines.english: They do the deeds which they are pre-ordained to do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿਰ ਗਭੀਰੁ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਤੂ ਗੁਣ ਗਿਆਨ ਅਮੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: gahir gabheer athaahu too gun giaan amolai |
lines.english: You are deep, profound and unfathomable; Your virtuous spiritual wisdom is priceless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗੁਣ ਬੋਲੈ ॥੨੩॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: tudhahu baahar kichh nahee naanak gun bolai |23|1|2|
lines.english: Without You, there is nothing at all; Nanak chants Your Glorious Praises. ||23||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਮਾਰੂ ਬਾਣੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag maaroo baanee kabeer jeeo kee |
lines.english: Raag Maaroo, The Word Of Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਡਹੁਗੇ ਪਰਵਾਰ ਸਕਲ ਸਿਉ ਰਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਪਹੁ ਅਭਾਗੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: booddahuge paravaar sakal siau raam na japahu abhaage |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall be drowned, along with your family, if you do not meditate on the Lord, you unfortunate person. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਡੀਆ ਕਵਨ ਕੁਮਤਿ ਤੁਮ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: paddeea kavan kumat tum laage |
lines.english: O Pandit, O religious scholar, in what foul thoughts are you engaged?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਪੜੇ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਗੁਨੁ ਖਰ ਚੰਦਨ ਜਸ ਭਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bed puraan parre kaa kiaa gun khar chandan jas bhaaraa |
lines.english: What is the use of reading the Vedas and the Puraanas? It is like loading a donkey with sandalwood.
